subject: Garuda, a winged humanoid summon entity with large pale wings and elaborate feathered headdress, arms raised
suspected_ip: Garuda (Final Fantasy XI / recurring FF summon)
description: A pale-skinned humanoid figure stands with arms raised and enormous feathered wings spread wide behind them. The figure has an elaborate headdress of green and orange-red feathers and visible decorative body markings. The skin is pale to near-white. They are posed in a triumphant or summoning posture against a dark forest background of deep greens and shadows with soft light filtering through. The creature is clearly avian in origin — large wings, feathered adornments, and taloned or clawed limbs. Scale is difficult to read at this resolution but the figure is imposing within the frame.
foreground: pale winged humanoid with feathered headdress and spread wings, arms raised
background: dense dark forest, deep green shadows, filtered light
emotion: triumphant, commanding, otherworldly presence — arms raised in power
